text: Finally got the webhook working after fighting with the API headers for three hours, ready for staging.
image_caption: Screenshot of a 401 Unauthorized response in a terminal, then a passing curl response in the next pane.

text: Shipped the new revenue dashboard to prod this morning. Two weeks of work. Stripe events now feed it in near-real-time.
image_caption: Dashboard screenshot with line charts and a 'live' indicator.

text: Led the design review for the new billing flow. Pushed back on the auto-renew default. Team agreed to make it opt-in.
image_caption: Whiteboard photo of a billing state machine.

text: 60-min discovery call with the Series A team at Vellum. They have the exact failure mode we built for. Sending a follow-up tomorrow.
Read the Product Quantization paper. Finally understand why FAISS does the codebook split the way it does. Want to try this on our embedding index next week.
image_caption: PDF page of the PQ paper with highlights.

text: Extracted the auth middleware out of the monolithic Express app into a standalone package. 14 files touched. All tests green.
image_caption: Diff view in the editor showing the new package structure.

text: Spent two hours chasing a flaky test in the checkout suite. Couldn't repro locally. Filed it and moved on. Frustrating.
image_caption: CI log with intermittent red builds.

text: Cut Postgres 13 over to Postgres 16 in staging. Logical replication. 40 minutes of catch-up lag, then green. Prod next Tuesday.
Paired with Priya for 90 minutes on async patterns. She had been blocking on a Promise.all that wasn't actually parallel. Walked through it together. She got it.
